blocks.value: 1MAX provides two powerful Grid Trading mechanisms tailored for different trading styles and risk preferences: Spot Grid Trading and Futures Grid Trading.

value: Spot Grid Trading places automatic buy and sell Spot orders in a price range you choose. This method is designed to capitalize on market volatility, allowing traders to buy low and sell high within a specific price range.

Futures Grid Trading places automatic buy and sell Futures contracts orders in a price range you choose (with leverage). You can set it to make money when prices rise (Long mode), fall (Short mode), or just bounce around (Neutral mode).

blocks.value: Spot Grid Trading

value: Beginners Friendly : No Leverage, Lower Risk, No Liquidation
Hands-Off : Run 24/7; Automatically Buys Low and Sells High when prices bounce around
Own the Actual Coins : No Futures Contracts, hold Real Assets.

blocks.value: Futures Grid Trading

value: Higher Profit Potential : Leverage Mechanism, control Bigger Position with Less Money
Flexible Strategies : Long, Short, Neutral Mode Provided
Adapt to Different Situations : Trending or Volatile Markets

faqs.question: 3. When is Grid Trading most effective?

blocks.value: Both Spot and Futures Grid Trading are particularly well-suited for Volatile and Sideways Markets.

faqs.question: 4. Which coin pairs / tokens supported by Grid Trading

blocks.value: Both Spot and Futures Grid Trading supported only USDT Tokens

value: Spot Grid Trading : All Coin Pairs Supported on 1MAX Spot Trading
Futures Grid Trading : All Futures Contract Supported on 1MAX Futures Trading

faqs.question: 5. Which accounts used for Grid Trading?

blocks.value: 1MAX Grid Trading requires you to have enough balance in the right account before you can start the bot :

value: Spot Grid Trading : You need sufficient balance in your Spot Account.

blocks.value: images/image.png

value: Futures Grid Trading : You need sufficient balance in your Futures Account.

blocks.value: images/image 1.png

faqs.question: 6. Are there any other fees associated with Grid Trading?

blocks.value: No worries — 1MAX Grid Trading doesn't charge any extra or special fees just for using the bot. The fee structure is exactly the same as your regular manual trading on 1MAX.

value: Important note for Futures Grid Trading : There is also a funding fee applies which is standard market mechanism paid/received.

blocks.value: 1MAX makes Grid Trading super easy with AI Grid for both Spot and Futures. The AI automatically figures out the best grid settings based on current market trends and how much the price is moving. Pick the trading pair and let AI do the setup.

faqs.question: 8. How to Access the Spot Grid?

blocks.value: Step 1 : Hover over the Spot → Select Spot Grid
images/image 2.png
Step 2 : Click on Trade Now Button
images/image 3.png

faqs.question: 9. How to start Spot Grid Trading?

blocks.value: Step 1 : Select a Trading Pair → Select Manual Spot Grid.
images/image 4.png
(Optional) Or select AI Spot Grid → Skip Step 2 & Step 3
images/image 5.png
Step 2 : Set the Price range

value: Lower Price = The minimum price which the grid will run.
Upper Price = The maximum price which the grid will run.

blocks.value: Step 3 : Set the number of grids
Choose how many intervals grids between your upper and lower price limits.

value: Arithmetic : Price difference between each grid is the same Fixed Amount.
Geometric : Price difference between each grid is Fixed Percentage.

blocks.value: Step 4 : Allocate the Investment Amount
The recommended investment amount should be greater than the suggested amount.
Step 5 : Enable Advanced settings (Optional)

value: Trailing settings : Extend the price range to stay aligned with market trends.
TP and SL : Take Profit / Stop Lose Price to end the Grid Strategy keep operating.
Sell All Base Coins on Stop : Enabled : Grid Stop → Automatically sell all base coin at the market priceDisabled : Grid Stop → All base coin will be transferred back to your spot account
Enabled : Grid Stop → Automatically sell all base coin at the market price
Disabled : Grid Stop → All base coin will be transferred back to your spot account
Enabled : Grid Stop → Automatically sell all base coin at the market price
Disabled : Grid Stop → All base coin will be transferred back to your spot account

blocks.value: Step 6 : Start the Strategy
Click Create → Review the settings → Click Confirm to activate the grid trading strategy
images/image 6.png

faqs.question: 10. Where to review running Spot Grid Strategy?

blocks.value: Step 1 : Hover over the Balances → Select Bot
images/image 7.png
Step 2 : Review previous Spot Grid Strategy by clicking Details.
images/image 8.png
You may also Hover over Spot → Spot Grid → Trade Now → Review the running Grid Strategy under Running Tab
images/image 9.png

value: Detail : Navigate to Grid Strategy Detail webpage.
Stop : Terminate the Grid Strategy.
Share : Share the Grid Strategy with 1MAX Invitation Code.

faqs.question: 11. How to Access the Futures Grid?

blocks.value: Step 1 : Hover over the Futures → Select Futures Grid
images/image 10.png
Step 2 : Click on Trade Now Button → Select Futures Grid Tab
images/image 11.png
images/image 12.png

faqs.question: 12. How to start Futures Grid Trading?

blocks.value: Step 1 : Select a Trading Pair → Select Manual Spot Grid.
images/image 13.png
(Optional) Or select AI Futures Grid → Skip Step 2 & Step 3
images/image 14.png
Step 2 : Set the Price range and Grid Mode

value: Lowest Price = The minimum price which the grid will run.
Highest Price = The maximum price which the grid will run.
Neutral = Grid Bot will execute both Long and Short Orders to Profit.
Long = Grid Bot will creates Buy Orders, Sell those to Profit
Short =Gird Bot will create Sell Orders, Buy those to Profit

blocks.value: Step 3 : Set the Grid Quantity
Choose how many intervals grids between your upper and lower price limits.
Choose the Leverage, the Higher Leverage, the more risk of liquidation

value: Arithmetic : Price difference between each grid is the same Fixed Amount.
Geometric : Price difference between each grid is Fixed Percentage.

blocks.value: Step 4 : Allocate the Investment Amount
The recommended investment amount should be greater than the suggested amount.
Step 5 : Enable Advanced settings (Optional)

value: Start Trigger : Grid will start when the latest price = trigger price.
Stop Trigger : Grid will stop when the latest price = trigger price.
Close all once bot stop : Enabled : Grid Stop → Automatically liquidate all positions at Market Price.Disabled : Grid Stop → Required manually liquidate all positions.
Enabled : Grid Stop → Automatically liquidate all positions at Market Price.
Disabled : Grid Stop → Required manually liquidate all positions.
Enabled : Grid Stop → Automatically liquidate all positions at Market Price.
Disabled : Grid Stop → Required manually liquidate all positions.

blocks.value: Step 6 : Start the Strategy
Click Create → Review the settings → Click Confirm to activate the grid trading strategy
images/image 15.png

faqs.question: 13. How to review running Futures Grid Strategy?

blocks.value: Step 1 : Hover over the Balances → Select Bot
images/image 16.png
Step 2 : Review previous Futures Grid Strategy by clicking Details.
images/image 17.png
You may also Hover over Futures → Futures Grid → Trade Now → Futures Grid → Review the running Grid Strategy under Running Tab
images/image 18.png

value: Stop : Terminate the Grid Strategy.
Detail : Navigate to Grid Strategy Detail webpage.
Share : Share the Grid Strategy with 1MAX Invitation Code.

faqs.question: 14. Can I stop my Grid Strategy at any time?

blocks.value: Yes, you can stop both Spot Grid and Futures Grid strategies at any time. Simply go to your active grid strategies details and click “Stop”.

faqs.question: 15. Where my balance go if the Grid Strategy Stop?

blocks.value: All remaining funds (including any unrealized profits/losses that have been settled) are automatically returned to the original account.

value: Spot Grid → Return remaining balance to Spot Account
Futures Grid → Return Remaining balance to Futures Account

faqs.question: 16. Can I change my running Grid Strategy settings?

blocks.value: No, unfortunately it is not possible to modify any parameters once a Grid Strategy is already running. This restriction helps prevent accidental changes or emotional decisions that could increase risk.
If you need to adjust settings:

value: Stop the current grid strategy (see Q14).
Create a new grid strategy with your updated parameters (see Q9 for Spot Grid, Q12 for Futures Grid).
